---
title: "The CEEMDAN-ps-gcGRU Model on Water Pressure Prediction With Strong Irregularity"
authors:
  - "T. Kan"
  - "J. Wang"
  - "Shunyu Wu"
year: 2023
venue: "IFAC-PapersOnLine"
status: "published"
type: "co-author"
doi: "10.1016/j.ifacol.2023.10.581"
url: "https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ifacol.2023.10.581"
keywords:
  - "water pressure forecasting"
  - "irregular time series"
  - "graph modeling"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Published (Conference Proceedings)  
**DOI:** [10.1016/j.ifacol.2023.10.581](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ifacol.2023.10.581)

Selected conference collaboration on irregular water-pressure forecasting with CEEMDAN and graph-convolutional recurrent modeling.
